children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, and return success or error
postconditions: new patient record created in patients data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with registration details (name, contact, etc.)

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

outputs.name: registration_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

global_vars.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

constraints.description: Patient ID must be unique across all patients

acceptance_criteria.description: New patient record is created in patients data store

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details from input, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, and return confirmation
postconditions: new appointment record created in appointments data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID, date, time, doctor, etc.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check slot availability and store appointment

outputs.name: booking_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

global_vars.description: Check slot availability and store appointment

data_operations.description: Check slot availability and store appointment

constraints.description: Appointment slot must be available before booking

acceptance_criteria.description: New appointment record is created in appointments data store

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID from input, verify patient exists, query appointments data store for all records, and return them

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Query all records for the patient

outputs.name: records_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, list of records, and message

global_vars.description: Query all records for the patient

data_operations.description: Query all records for the patient

constraints.description: Patient must be registered before retrieving records

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields from input, verify patient exists, update patients data store, and return confirmation
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and fields to update

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and update profile

outputs.name: update_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and message

global_vars.description: Verify patient exists and update profile

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and update profile

constraints.description: Patient must be registered before updating profile

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients data store

children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Parse the input JSON to determine which command to execute
children.behavior: Extract the 'command' field from input JSON and return it along with the rest of the data
guarantees: command is one of the valid commands

outputs.name: data
outputs.description: Remaining JSON data for the command

constraints.description: Input must be valid JSON with a 'command' field

acceptance_criteria.description: Command and data are extracted from input

children.name: ValidateInput
children.purpose: Validate the input JSON structure and required fields
children.behavior: Check that input has required fields based on command, return validation result

outputs.name: validation_result
outputs.description: JSON with valid boolean and error message if invalid

constraints.description: Input must have required fields based on command

acceptance_criteria.description: Validation result is returned with valid boolean and error message if invalid

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Format the output JSON with success, data, and message
children.behavior: Take the result from a child operation and wrap it in a standard response format

call_inputs.name: result
call_inputs.description: Result from a child operation (success, data, message)

constraints.description: Result must contain success, data, and message fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Output is formatted as JSON with success, data, message

governance_notes: All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces exactly. Resource fields (global_vars, data_operations, requested_capabilities) are derived solely from internal_leaf_accesses. ParseCommand, ValidateInput, and FormatResponse have no data store accesses, so their resource fields are empty. The remaining four children have synchronized global_vars and data_operations matching their internal_leaf_accesses. No signatures were changed.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All 7 signatures are preserved exactly as provided in Stage 2. No modifications made to any signature.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: For each child with internal_leaf_accesses, the resource and operation are mapped directly to global_vars and data_operations. For example, RegisterPatient's internal_leaf_accesses has patients/read_write, which becomes a global_var and data_operation with the same resource and operation_type.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For all children, global_vars and data_operations are perfectly synchronized. Each entry in global_vars has a corresponding entry in data_operations with the same resource and operation. Children without internal_leaf_accesses (ParseCommand, ValidateInput, FormatResponse) have empty arrays for both.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All data store accesses from internal_leaf_accesses are covered by global_vars and data_operations. The patients data store is accessed by RegisterPatient (read_write), BookAppointment (read), GetRecords (read), and UpdateProfile (read_write). The appointments data store is accessed by BookAppointment (read_write) and GetRecords (read). No data store accesses are missing.
